allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add @Fuzzable macro and per-test coverage utilities

- Implement @Fuzzable macro that generates `fuzz` property using cartesian
  product of all stored properties'' fuzz values
- Add per-test coverage API using LLVM profile runtime functions via dlsym
- Include demo tests for coverage isolation and macro expansion
- Switch macro tests to MacroTesting library for proper Swift Testing support

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
